pr.title: Show and sort by remaining code bytes in Wiki TU page
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Tooling/documentation PR updating tools/wiki_tu.py so the Wiki translation-unit page shows remaining code bytes, computes that value from total_code minus matched_code, and sorts incomplete TU lists by the remaining-code count.

key_files.role: Wiki TU page generator; adds remaining-code calculation, display column, and sorting key.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: tools/wiki_tu.py added 22 deleted 9
raw_diff: tools/wiki_tu.py hunks adding get_measure_int, remaining_code, by_remaining, and Remaining header

what_changed.text: Added get_measure_int(unit, key) to centralize integer conversion of unit['measures'] values with missing/falsey values defaulting to 0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added def get_measure_int(unit, key: str) -> int: return int(unit['measures'].get(key) or 0)

what_changed.text: Replaced repeated int(measures.get(... ) or 0) conversions for matched/total code and data with get_measure_int.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: percent_cells and row_full now call get_measure_int for matched_code, total_code, matched_data, and total_data

what_changed.text: Computed unit['measures']['remaining_code'] as total_code - matched_code while iterating units.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added matched_code, total_code, and unit['measures']['remaining_code'] = total_code - matched_code in unit loop

what_changed.text: Added a Remaining column to the full Wiki table; row_full prints a friendly size for nonzero remaining_code and '—' when it is zero.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: row_full adds remaining variable and full_header changes from File|Matched|Total|.text %... to File|Matched|Total|Remaining|.text %...

what_changed.text: Sorted in_progress and data_left lists by remaining_code using by_remaining.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added by_remaining(unit), in_progress.sort(key=by_remaining), data_left.sort(key=by_remaining)

smart_moves.text: Factored repeated measure-to-int conversion into a local helper before adding another derived metric, reducing duplicated defaulting logic in table generation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: get_measure_int introduced and reused in percent_cells, row_full, and by_remaining

smart_moves.text: Stored remaining_code in the existing measures dictionary so row rendering and sorting share the same computed value.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unit['measures']['remaining_code'] assigned before classification into linked/data_left/in_progress

decomp_lessons.text: Progress tooling can make decomp work queues more actionable by displaying absolute remaining .text bytes in addition to matched and total bytes.
evidence_refs: PR title: Show and sort by remaining code bytes in Wiki TU page
raw_diff: Remaining column added to full_header and row_full

decomp_lessons.text: When deriving progress metrics from optional JSON measures, normalize missing measure values once through a helper before computing display fields or sort keys.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: get_measure_int returns int(unit['measures'].get(key) or 0)
raw_diff: remaining_code computed from get_measure_int(unit, 'total_code') and get_measure_int(unit, 'matched_code')

naming_conventions.text: New helper and key-function names are direct role descriptions: get_measure_int for measure parsing and by_remaining for sorting by remaining_code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: def get_measure_int(unit, key: str) -> int
raw_diff: def by_remaining(unit): return get_measure_int(unit, 'remaining_code')

naming_conventions.text: The derived metric is named remaining_code, matching the PR title's user-facing concept of remaining code bytes.
evidence_refs: PR title: Show and sort by remaining code bytes in Wiki TU page
raw_diff: unit['measures']['remaining_code'] = total_code - matched_code

accepted_candidate_records.title: wiki_tu Remaining column and sort
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2649 updated tools/wiki_tu.py to compute remaining_code as total_code - matched_code, display it as a Remaining column in the full Wiki TU table, and sort in_progress and data_left lists by that remaining-code value.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unit['measures']['remaining_code'] = total_code - matched_code
raw_diff: full_header adds Remaining column
raw_diff: in_progress.sort(key=by_remaining) and data_left.sort(key=by_remaining)

source_update_candidates.title: Document Wiki TU remaining_code behavior
source_update_candidates.text: Consider documenting that tools/wiki_tu.py derives remaining_code from total_code - matched_code, displays it only in the full table, renders zero as '—', and sorts in_progress and data_left rows by that value.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: remaining_code derivation, row_full rendering, by_remaining sort, and full_header update
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a tooling behavior fact supported by the PR diff, but it belongs in source/tooling documentation rather than as a global decomp standard.

rejection_notes: Do not infer any matching, objdiff, build, or regression-validation result from this PR slice.
Do not promote this tooling change into a global decomp standard; it affects Wiki progress display, not source decomp style.
